title: aeonium complanatum
intro: Aeonium complanatum, also known as the spreading emerald rose or giant aeonium, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae and is native to the Canary Islands. Aeonium complanatum has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and boosting the immune system, while its herbal preparations include infusions, tinctures, and salves that can be used topically or internally. However, more research is needed to fully understand the potential benefits and risks of using Aeonium complanatum as a medicinal plant.
